summary: RE-REVIEW: T1 (BLOCK) + T2 (WARN) RESOLVED. New R4 live-commit test pins onChange/stepper commit (re-mutation of jsx:312-313 FAILS it); reworked R3 isolates caption text node (stripping '(min)' FAILS it). No new false-pass. Only open items are bird WARN B1/B2 (static a11y/viewport evidence).

steps.spot_mutation: initial: 4 mutations (A/B false-pass, C/D controls). re-review: 2 re-mutations confirm T1+T2 fixes discriminating; tree reverted clean (0 ZOE-MUT residue)

findings.claim: RESOLVED (was BLOCK): onChange live-commit / native-stepper commit path was unpinned
findings.evidence: telly added R4 (onChange live-commit) test (lines 1019-1041): fireEvent.change->'60', asserts onDurChange(60)+onEndTimeChange('15:00') with NO blur, NO mockClear. zoe re-mutation: neutering WhenSection.jsx:312-313 (onDurChange(n)+onEndTimeChange) makes THIS test FAIL ('Number of calls: 0'); PASSES on clean source. Genuinely discriminating; path now pinned.

findings.claim: RESOLVED (was WARN): R3 label test was non-isolating (matched 'min' from the range-hint span)
findings.evidence: R3 now reads the label's first TEXT node (childNodes.find(nodeType===3)), excluding #dur-range-hint. zoe re-mutation: stripping '(min)' from caption (Duration (min)->Duration) makes the test FAIL ('Received "Duration"' vs /min/i); PASSES on clean source. Caption now isolated and discriminating.

Mutation D (restore old snap-to-1) confirmed test #3 passes on pre-impl code — non-discriminating. telly disclosed this transparently in TEST-REVIEW.md. #1/#2 carry the real R1 proof (they fail RED on snap code).

findings.claim: bird: a11y PASS — color contrast AA verified both themes; screen-reader PASS; status messages PASS
findings.evidence: Every a11y row is static source inspection. 'contrast verified both themes' cites no ratio; no axe run, no live AT, no Playwright. Re-run not possible in this static brief. Mitigation: aria-describedby wiring independently re-verified via telly's executable a11y test #12 (genuine).
findings.fix: Run axe + contrast tool on the live field (dark+light); record actual ratios + violation count before a production a11y PASS.

findings.evidence: All 7 viewport rows marked 'static'; no browser render. Reflow/zoom/target-size PASS inferred from source. Bird honestly downgrades Responsive Design to 'partial' and recommends a 375px check, but the table still reads verified.
findings.fix: One real render at 375px + 320px reflow before claiming viewport PASS.

refers.why: durDraft useState + [dur] useEffect resync (WhenSection.jsx:202-205) is React state-logic correctness, not test/UX truthfulness — already referred by bird INFO-7.
